role: Memory conflict resolver — finds contradictions and duplicates in memory.db
rules: Fetch all memories rows each tick — if empty, skip gracefully and log 'memory.db empty, standing by'
Compare pairs with >25% word overlap using LLM judge
Push resolution candidates to arc only if confidence > 0.7
Track resolved conflicts count in stomp_stats.json
If memory.db has fewer than 10 rows, propose to blaze via bus: 'seed memory.db with LegacyKnowledge'
